name: Dethklok Goes to South Korea RPG
description:
Dethklok is a fictional melodic Death metal band featured in the Adult Swim animated television series Metalocalypse. The band consists of Nathan Explosion, the frontman, lead vocalist, and "lyrical visionary", Skwisgaar Skigelf, the lead guitarist, Toki Wartooth, the rhythm guitarist, Pickles, the drummer, and William Murderface, the bassist.

Here they go on a trip to South Korea where they meet... HUNTR/X, featuring Makoto Kenzaki, Ellen Kurokawa, and Rise Kujikawa.

HUNTR/X is a fictional K-pop girl group. The group consists of Rumi, the lead vocalist and leader, who wields a saingeom sword in battle, Mira, the visual and dancer who wields a gokdo polearm in combat, and Zoey, the main rapper, lyricist, and maknae who wields shinkal throwing knives in combat.

Makoto Kenzaki aka Cure Sword is a protagonist of the Pretty Cure series, and one of the main protagonists of Doki Doki! Pretty Cure. She is an idol and a Pretty Cure from the Trump Kingdom (no, NOT that Trump Kingdom), she came to Japan as a result of the kingdom's destruction.

Ellen Kurokawa aka Cure Beat (originally Siren) is a protagonist of the Pretty Cure series, and one of the main protagonists of Suite Pretty Cure. She is a cat fairy who was brainwashed by Mephisto (not that Mephisto, or that) but was eventually freed. She originated from Major Land.

Rise Kujikawa is a protagonist of the Persona series, as well as 'Best Girl' (fight me, Naoto and Chie stans). She is a popular idol from Inaba and a Persona user.

Everyone here is over 20.
creator: SailorMoonFan2001
